arts.ttl: Alan Shearer launches furious VAR rant after Michael Oliver and Arsenal red card controversy
arts.sum: Match of the Day pundit Alan Shearer has had his say on the controversial red card that was shown to Myles Lewis-Skelly during Arsenal's win over Wolves on Saturday

arts.ttl: Arsenal legend Ian Wright fumes at Myles Lewis-Skelly's 'joke' red card in 1-0 win over Wolves and says refs are 'nowhere near' good enough
arts.sum: Ian Wright has slammed the Premier League's standard of officiating after Arsenal received a controversial red card against Wolves on Saturday.

arts.ttl: 'Vibes of Thierry Henry': BBC pundit wowed by Arsenal transfer target who's now on 19 goals this season
arts.sum: Arsenal are currently in pursuit of attacking reinforcements as they look to apply the finishing touches to their squad. For months, the Gunners have been...

arts.ttl: Wolves 0-1 Arsenal: Vitor Pereira rueful of failure to defeat 10-man Gunners
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers head coach Vitor Pereira admits that his players 'wasted a big chance' to defeat Arsenal, ultimately losing 1-0 to their 10-men opponents.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Sesko DECISION, NEW Zinchenko talks, Cunha THREAT
arts.sum: FootballTransfers runs through all the latest Arsenal transfer news, rumours and gossip, including updates on Benjamin Sesko, Matheus Cunha and Oleksandr Zinchenko . Arsenal Transfer News Today: Sesko DECISION, NEW Zinchenko talks, Cunha THREAT

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta faces January transfer decision as Atletico Madrid and Borussia Dortmund eye deal
arts.sum: Oleksandr Zinchenko has reportedly been subject to an enquiry from Spanish giants Atletico Madrid. The Arsenal star has struggled for regular game time this campaign, falling behind teenage left-back Myles Lewis-Skelly and Riccardo Calafiori.

arts.ttl: How many Arsenal games Myles Lewis-Skelly will miss revealed after controversial Wolves red card
arts.sum: The Premier League match centre account on X (formerly Twitter) confirmed that Michael Oliver's decision to issue a straight red card was upheld after a check by VAR. His red card, which came after a late attempt to win the ball on the edge of the Wolves box following a corner, was given for'serious foul play'.

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka makes Arsenal feelings clear after Wolves win and Myles Lewis-Skelly red card drama
arts.sum: Arsenal star Bukayo Saka has given his response to his side’s 1-0 win against Wolverhampton Wanderers, as he appears to make his feelings on the red card for Myles Lewis-Skelly clear. Referee Michael Oliver showed Lewis-Skelly a straight red card for a challenge on Matt Doherty as he started to break away.

arts.ttl: Arteta 'fuming' over red but hails big Arsenal win
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta said he was "absolutely fuming" about Myles Lewis-Skelly's red card but praised his Arsenal team's character in a 1-0 win over Wolves.

arts.ttl: Arsenal next five Premier League fixtures compared to Liverpool after title race twist
arts.sum: Here, football.london has a look at Arsenal's next five Premier League fixtures and compares them to what Liverpool and Forest have upcoming. With Liverpool cruising against Ipswich Town and Nottingham Forest being well beaten by Bournemouth at the same time, Arsenal's toll threatened to see them drop yet more points.
